title: OpenAI Researcher Access Program
description: The OpenAI Researcher Access Program provides subsidized API access for research into responsible AI deployment, risk mitigation, and the societal impact of AI systems.
eligibility: Researchers with an active affiliation to an academic or research institution, and nonprofits conducting research, may apply from countries supported by the OpenAI API.
value: Up to $1,000 in OpenAI API credits valid for 12 months
